general.title: General Settings
general.autoSaveSnapshotDesc: Automatically save page snapshots when saving bookmarks
general.enableOmniboxSearchDesc: Type 'ham' in browser address bar and press space to search and open bookmarks via keyword or semantic matching
general.shortcutDesc: Configure extension shortcuts in browser settings
general.shortcutDescFirefox: Click gear icon → Manage Extension Shortcuts
general.panelPositionDesc: Set whether the sidebar appears on the left or right side in content pages

customFilters.title: Custom Filters
customFilters.description: Create and manage custom filters to quickly filter bookmarks
customFilters.noFiltersDesc: Click "Add Filter" to create your first custom filter
customFilters.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete the filter "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

ai.title: AI Service Configuration
ai.description: Configure AI analysis service to automatically extract bookmark summaries and tags
ai.enableAIDesc: Automatically use AI to generate summaries and tags when saving bookmarks
ai.apiKeyDesc: Your API Key will be securely stored locally and never uploaded to the server
ai.translationDesc: Translate foreign language content to English
ai.presetTagsDesc: Configure preset tags, AI will prioritize matching relevant tags for bookmarks
ai.addTagPlaceholder: Enter tag name, press Enter to add
ai.noTags: No preset tags added yet. After adding preset tags, AI will recommend tags more accurately.

embedding.title: Semantic Search Configuration
embedding.description: Configure Embedding service to enable semantic search
embedding.enabledDesc: Search bookmarks using vector similarity for fuzzy matching and semantic understanding
embedding.providerNotSupported: Current provider does not support Embedding
embedding.apiKeyDesc: API Key for Embedding service (stored locally, never uploaded)

dialogs.rebuildWarning: Rebuilding the vector index will generate embeddings for bookmarks. This may take a while, continue?
dialogs.rebuildModeIncrementalDesc: Only generate vectors for uncovered bookmarks, keeping existing data
dialogs.rebuildModeFullDesc: Clear all vectors and regenerate, useful for switching models or fixing data
dialogs.fullRebuildWarning: This will delete all existing vectors and regenerate embeddings for all bookmarks. This is used for switching models or fixing data. This may take a while, continue?
dialogs.clearWarning: This will delete all bookmark vectors, semantic search will be temporarily unavailable. Confirm clear?

storage.title: Storage Management
storage.description: Manage your bookmark data, snapshots, and vector index

bookmarkData.title: Bookmarks & Categories
bookmarkData.clearDesc: Delete all bookmarks and categories, keeping AI config and settings
bookmarkData.confirmWarning: This will delete all bookmarks and categories. AI config and app settings will be kept. This action cannot be undone!

snapshotData.title: Web Snapshots
snapshotData.clearDesc: Delete all locally saved web snapshots to free up storage
snapshotData.confirmWarning: This will delete all locally saved web snapshots. Your bookmarks will not be affected. This action cannot be undone!

vectorData.title: Semantic Vector Index
vectorData.clearDesc: Clear the semantic search vector index (can be rebuilt anytime)
vectorData.confirmWarning: This will clear all vector indexes. Semantic search will be temporarily unavailable and can be rebuilt in AI settings.

storage.clearAllDesc: Clear bookmarks, categories, snapshots, and vectors (AI config and settings will be kept)
storage.clearAllWarning: This will delete all bookmarks, categories, snapshots, and vector indexes. AI config, tag settings, and WebDAV config will be kept. This action cannot be undone!

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Intelligent Bookmark Management Tool
about.intro: HamHome is a powerful browser extension that helps you manage and organize bookmarks, using AI technology to automatically categorize and tag bookmarks.

dialogs.clearWarning: This will delete all bookmarks, categories, snapshots, and vector data. AI config and app settings will be kept. This action cannot be undone!

messages.temperatureDesc: Control the randomness of generated content (0-2, recommended 0.3)
messages.apiKeySecure: Your API Key will be securely stored locally and never uploaded to the server

importExport.title: Import/Export
importExport.description: Backup or migrate your bookmark data
importExport.importDetailsWithCategories: Successfully imported {{imported}} bookmarks, created {{categoriesCreated}} categories, skipped {{skipped}} duplicates
importExport.importDetailsWithAI: Successfully imported {{imported}} bookmarks, AI processed {{aiProcessed}}, skipped {{skipped}} duplicates
importExport.importDetailsWithAIAndCategories: Successfully imported {{imported}} bookmarks, AI processed {{aiProcessed}}, created {{categoriesCreated}} categories, skipped {{skipped}} duplicates
importExport.aiErrorTitle: AI Analysis Failed for Some Bookmarks
importExport.aiErrorDesc: AI API calls failed. Bookmarks were imported as 'Uncategorized' without summaries. Please check your AI config or network status.

export.title: Export Bookmarks
export.description: Export your bookmark data as a backup file
export.jsonDesc: Contains all bookmarks and category information, can be used for complete data recovery
export.htmlDesc: Generate a beautiful HTML page that can be viewed directly in the browser

import.title: Import Bookmarks
import.description: Import bookmark data from a file
import.formatHTML: Browser bookmark HTML file (exported from Chrome/Firefox/Edge)
import.preserveFoldersDesc: When importing HTML bookmarks, automatically convert folders to categories to maintain hierarchy
import.enableAIAnalysisDesc: Use AI to analyze bookmark content during import, automatically generating summaries, categories and tags (mutually exclusive with preserve folders)
import.fetchPageContentDesc: Access bookmark URLs to get page content for more accurate AI analysis (slower)
import.fromBrowserDesc: Directly read bookmarks from current browser

syncBrowser.title: Sync to Browser Bookmarks
syncBrowser.description: Reverse-sync your HamHome categories and bookmarks to the browser's native bookmark bar, automatically creating folders based on your category hierarchy
syncBrowser.action: Sync to Browser Bookmark Bar Now
syncBrowser.subtitle: Write {{bookmarkCount}} bookmarks and {{categoryCount}} categories to the browser bookmark bar
syncBrowser.syncDetails: Successfully wrote {{created}} bookmarks, skipped {{skipped}} already existing
syncBrowser.useRootFolder: Wrap inside a top-level HamHome folder
syncBrowser.useRootFolderDesc: When enabled, all content is placed inside a "HamHome" folder on the bookmark bar; when disabled, top-level categories expand directly on the bookmark bar
syncBrowser.clearFirst: Clear existing content before writing (overwrite mode)
syncBrowser.clearFirstDesc: When enabled, all existing content in the target folder is deleted before re-writing for a full overwrite; when disabled, incremental merge is used (skipping already-existing URLs)
syncBrowser.skipDuplicatesDesc: When enabled, all browser bookmarks are scanned to ensure that the synced bookmarks' URLs do not duplicate existing ones anywhere in the browser

errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format, please select a JSON or HTML file
errors.bookmarksApiNotSupported: The current browser does not support the Bookmarks API. Please use Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.description: Manage your data privacy and security settings

dataStorage.title: Data Storage
dataStorage.description: Learn how your data is stored
dataStorage.localStorageDesc: All your bookmark data is stored locally in the browser and never uploaded to any server. Data is securely stored using Chrome Storage API.
dataStorage.apiKeySecurityDesc: Your AI API Key is only stored locally and communicates directly with AI service providers without going through any intermediate servers.

aiPrivacy.title: AI Service Privacy
aiPrivacy.description: Control data sent during AI analysis
aiPrivacy.customDomainsDesc: In addition to system-protected pages, you can add domains that need extra protection
aiPrivacy.dataNoticeDesc: When you use AI analysis features, the following data is sent to AI service providers:

dataItems.title: Page Title
dataItems.content: Page content summary (for generating descriptions and tags)

snapshot.title: Snapshot Settings
snapshot.autoSaveDesc: Automatically save page snapshots when saving bookmarks for offline viewing
snapshot.tipContent: The snapshot feature saves page HTML locally, which may take up significant storage space. You can turn off this feature if you're concerned about storage.

categories.title: Category Management
categories.description: Create and manage your bookmark categories
categories.noCategories: No categories yet, click "New Category" or "Use Preset" to start

dialogs.deleteDescription: After deleting the category "{{name}}", bookmarks in this category will be moved to "Uncategorized". This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.batchDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected categories? Bookmarks in these categories will be moved to "Uncategorized". This action cannot be undone.

preset.title: Select Category Scheme
preset.description: Choose a preset category scheme or use AI to generate personalized categories
preset.generalDesc: Suitable for daily information gathering and work-life balance
preset.professionalDesc: Suitable for developers, designers, content creators and other professionals
preset.aiInputPlaceholder: For example: I'm a frontend developer, I usually bookmark technical docs, design inspiration, learning resources, and also follow tech news and investment content...

widget.title: WebDAV Sync
widget.tooltipDesc: Supports WebDAV protocol, syncs your data to your personal NAS or private cloud, protecting data privacy (not a 3rd party public service).

config.title: WebDAV Data Sync
config.description: Configure WebDAV service to sync your bookmarks, categories, and settings across multiple devices. If you accidentally enter the wrong sync configuration and cause a lock, you can directly clear all local data below to cut off the sync connection.
config.enabledDesc: When enabled, two-way sync will automatically run in the background
config.e2ePasswordDesc: Once configured, cloud data will be encrypted (feature not yet available)
config.clearRemoteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all synced data on the WebDAV remote? This action cannot be undone. Sync can be restarted later if needed.
